_purpose: Full training run for the SetTransformer agent. 1500 episodes with periodic eval (every 50 episodes, 5 deterministic episodes) and checkpointing every 100 episodes with save_best. Long-episode env configs (e.g. baseline.json with 200k sim_time) make each episode worth many PPO updates, so 1500 is a substantial budget. W&B + reports + step-level logging on.
